title: Anenji ANJ-11KW-48V-WIFI-P support archive with secondary-control shadow learning
summary: Private support archive 01KPGTNHHQ4VXCR6ZV5JYCW7ER (2026-07-07) for an Anenji ANJ-11KW-48V-WIFI-P unit. The existing model-specific runtime binding was confirmed, and shadow-learning evidence matched the missing writable control registers 608, 633, 639, 642, and 649 for OP2 overload alarm, secondary charging priority, constant-voltage to float-charge wait time, maximum discharge-current protection, and OP1 off-grid SOC protection.
